Bash(collections must have exclusive access"

Solution:
- Replace Dictionary with ConcurrentDictionary
- ConcurrentDictionary is thread-safe for concurrent reads/writes
- No locking required, better performance than manual locks
- All existing code \(TryGetValue, indexer, Clear\) works the same

Impact:
- Fixes crashes during async Find All operations
- Enables safe parallel/async operations on ByteProvider
- No performance regression \(ConcurrentDictionary optimized for concurrent access\)

This bug was introduced by the async operations feature implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
